HI, I’M ZOE!
I am an artist/entrepreneur specializing in memecoin art, branding, and visual storytelling. Known for creative contributions and viral projects such as Myro, Peng, Andy, Four, Lofi, and Axol.

ZOEXBT
Designed by
HI, I’M ZOE!
I am an artist/entrepreneur specializing in memecoin art, branding, and visual storytelling. Known for creative contributions and viral projects such as Myro, Peng, Andy, Four, Lofi, and Axol, my work blends together a niche understanding of internet culture and blockchain technology. With an eye for dynamic design and innovative expression, I aim to create visuals that both captivate individuals and build strong communities.
